---
name: New Game Template
about: Propose or submit a new game template
title: 'Template: '
labels: template
assignees: ''
---

**Game type**
What kind of game? (e.g. tower defense, card game, rhythm game)

**Description**
Brief description of the gameplay, mechanics, and what makes it interesting.

**Reference games**
Any existing games this is inspired by?

**Complexity estimate**
- Entities: ~how many?
- Scripts: ~how many behaviors/systems?
- UI panels: ~how many?

**Implementation notes**
Any technical details worth mentioning (special physics, custom UI, etc.)
